title: Resolve, to Rename the Little River Bridge in the Town of Cornish the Cornish Veterans Memorial Bridge
last_house_action: 3/10/2026 - FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

actions.description: Committee on TRANSPORTATION suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Report READ and ACCEPTED . Bill READ ONCE. ASSIGNED FOR SECOND READING NEXT LEGISLATIVE DAY.
COMMITTEE ON BILLS IN THE SECOND READING REPORTS NO FURTHER VERBAL AMENDMENTS NECESSARY. REPORT ACCEPTED. READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED. Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence.
CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Resolve was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED. In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
